assumptions.text: Null billable_rate renders as blank placeholder em-dash ('—') in rate column; the row renders, no numeric format applied to null value.
assumptions.chosen_interpretation: Render a null billable_rate as a blank placeholder (an em-dash '—') in the rate column; the row renders, no numeric format applied to a null value.
rejected_interpretations: Render a null billable_rate as zero ('0.00') in the rate column, formatted like any numeric rate.
Omit the rate field entirely for a null-rate project; the row renders name and currency only.

touch_set.note: Fix edits _ProjectManagementAdapter._render in C3 (src/freelancer_app/wsgi.py) — the S4 surface. R11 repro requirement asserts correct behavior baseline R6 is violated by. RE-RANK rebuilds S4.
